# MuleSoft Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Shop API Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Shop API Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Shop API Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Commerce Cloud B2C Shop API Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [B2C Shop Connector 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Commerce Cloud B2C Shop Connector 2.1 Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/shop-api-connector-examples.md)
- [Commerce Cloud B2C Shop Connector 2.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/shop-api-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Commerce Cloud B2C Shop Connector 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/shop-api-connector-studio.md)
- [Commerce Cloud B2C Shop Connector 2.1 - Troubleshoot](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/shop-api-connector-troubleshoot.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Commerce Cloud B2C Shop Connector to Version 2.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/shop-api-connector-upgrade.md)
- [Commerce Cloud B2C Shop Connector 2.1 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/commerce-cloud-shop-api-connector/latest/shop-api-connector-xml-maven.md)
